chat.empty: No messages yet. Say anything to start.

persona.persona_block_help: Who she is · personality · values · voice
persona.self_block_help: First person · how she thinks of herself
persona.user_block_help: Third person · what she knows about you
persona.import_prompt: Have existing material for the persona to remember?

voice.enabled_help: When on, persona replies also produce audio
voice.voice_id_help: Currently active voice · from FishAudio's model library
voice.no_samples: No samples yet. Click 'Clone a new voice' to start.
voice.provider_not_configured: TTS provider not configured · check the [voice] section in config.toml

memory.delete_confirm_body: This cannot be undone. Events and thoughts that would be affected are listed below.

events.empty: No events yet · chat with the persona for a while and she'll summarise them herself
events.lead: Concrete events the persona remembers. Each one carries a timestamp, emotional weight, related people, and mood. {{count}} total on the server.
events.no_match_body: Try a broader keyword, or click "Clear" to return to the full list.
events.empty_title: The persona doesn't remember anything yet
events.empty_body: Chat with the persona for a few rounds and the background consolidator will compress conversations into events that appear here automatically.

thoughts.empty: No long-term thoughts yet · once enough events accumulate she'll reflect on them
thoughts.lead: Higher-level observations about you that the persona settles into across many conversations. Usually produced by the reflection module, but imported source material can contribute too. {{count}} total on the server.
thoughts.no_match_body: Try a broader keyword, or click "Clear" to return to the full list.
thoughts.empty_body: Once enough events accumulate, the reflection module produces higher-level observations about you.

memory_list.no_sources: This thought isn't supported by any event (the reflection chain may have been cleared)
memory_list.no_derivatives: No thoughts have settled out of this event yet
memory_list.confirm_delete_cascade:
Delete this memory?

{{preview}}

This memory produced {{depCount}} derived thought(s):
{{depsList}}

OK = cascade delete (remove all)
Cancel = keep derivatives (orphan them)
To back out entirely, press Esc to close this dialog

cost.lead: Every LLM call is logged. Below is the estimated spend broken down by time window and feature — the authoritative bill is still on the provider's console.
cost.empty_body: Chat with the persona a few rounds or run an import once, and you'll see chat / consolidate / import spend broken down here.

config_tab.lead: Changes here atomically write back to config.toml and take effect in the daemon immediately, no restart needed. Structural fields like data directory and database path cannot be changed online.
config_tab.llm_lead: Controls who generates the persona's replies. Once saved, the next message uses the new model.
config_tab.llm_saved_note: Saved · takes effect on next LLM call ✓
config_tab.llm_timeout_sub: Abort a call after this many seconds, 1 – 600
config_tab.llm_api_key_sub: Read-only · env var name · the secret itself lives in .env / the system environment
config_tab.memory_lead: Controls how many events and thoughts the persona pulls in as context each turn.
config_tab.memory_bonus_sub: {{value}}   ·  weighting for memories involving people around you · 0.0 – 2.0
config_tab.consolidate_lead: Controls which conversations count as "trivial" and get skipped vs. which ones enter the extraction / reflection pipeline.
config_tab.consolidate_trivial_msgs_sub: Sessions with fewer messages than this skip extraction entirely
config_tab.consolidate_trivial_tokens_sub: Sessions with fewer tokens than this skip extraction entirely
config_tab.consolidate_reflection_limit_sub: Max reflections per 24h · guards your LLM budget
config_tab.system_lead: The fields below cannot be changed online — data_dir and db_path determine where your database file lives; changing them requires stopping the daemon, editing config.toml manually, then restarting.

persona_blocks.persona_hint: Editing this re-tunes the persona's core character. Takes effect on the next message.
persona_blocks.self_hint: Editing this rewrites the persona's self-narrative. Usually accrues automatically via reflection; most of the time you don't need to touch it.
persona_blocks.user_label: What the persona knows about you
persona_blocks.user_hint: Editing this changes identity-level knowledge of you (job, family, long-term hobbies).
persona_blocks.relationship_label: People the persona knows around you
persona_blocks.relationship_hint: Editing this changes the persona's understanding of people close to you. Grouped by person.
persona_blocks.mood_hint: Editing this temporarily adjusts the persona's current mood.
persona_blocks.mood_warning: After the next conversation the runtime will refresh and overwrite this.
persona_blocks.placeholder_small: (leave blank and it will evolve through conversation)
persona_blocks.display_name_hint: What to call the persona on Web / Discord / any channel
persona_blocks.section_lead: The 5 long-term blocks that shape the persona. Editing these directly affects behaviour on the next conversation.
persona_blocks.import_prompt: Have existing material for the persona to remember?
persona_blocks.import_body: Chat logs, journals, documents — the importer feeds them to an LLM which files events, people around you, and facts about you into the right memory layers.

voice_tab.section_lead: Controls whether the persona reads replies aloud with TTS.
voice_tab.clone_prompt: Want the persona to speak in your voice?
voice_tab.clone_body: Upload a 10-60s clean recording (several clips is better) to train your own voice — preview before activating. Without a clone, the default FishAudio voice is used.
voice_tab.toggle_help_on: The persona's next reply will try to read aloud via TTS.
voice_tab.toggle_help_off: Persona replies stay as text only.

onboarding.welcome_subtitle: Before we start — who is this persona?
onboarding.footnote: Everything stays on this machine. No server, no third party.
onboarding.path_blank_body: Describe the persona in a few sentences — personality, tone, your relationship. The simplest starting point.
onboarding.path_material_body: Chat logs, articles, journals, a bio — the LLM reads them and drafts a first version of the persona.
onboarding.blank_lead_line1: Write a few sentences. Their personality, how they speak, your relationship — anything you want them to know from the start.
onboarding.blank_lead_line2: Everything else (your identity, specific events, people around you) can come later.
onboarding.name_placeholder: Her · Alex · any name you like
onboarding.blank_textarea_placeholder:
e.g.⋯

You're a friend who actually listens.
When I'm not okay you sit with me first, not rushing to tell me what to do.
You don't dismiss me with empty "hang in there" platitudes.
If I want advice you give it; if I just want to be heard you're happy to stay.
onboarding.need_a_few_sentences: Write a few sentences to start. You can always come back and add more.
onboarding.upload_lead_line1: Paste text about yourself — a bio, journal entries, a short intro, or chat logs with a persona you like.
onboarding.upload_lead_line2: The LLM will extract events and thoughts, then draft the 5 core blocks of the persona. You'll review the draft next.
onboarding.material_placeholder:
e.g. a bio or a long journal — the more specific, the better.

"My name is Rain. 28, software engineer in Beijing. I have a black cat named Mochi, adopted in 2020.
I'm usually quiet, not the one to start conversations, but I love deep talks. Learning to cook lately⋯"

The more real and specific, the closer the draft will be to you.
onboarding.need_min_chars: At least {{min}} characters. More specific is better.
onboarding.waiting_lead: The LLM is breaking your material into events and thoughts, then drafting the 5 persona blocks. Usually a minute or two.
onboarding.review_lead: Based on your material ({{events}} events · {{thoughts}} thoughts), the LLM wrote these 5 block drafts. Edit anything you like. Click "Finish" when satisfied.
onboarding.review_block_self_hint: Usually left blank at onboarding · accrues through reflection later
onboarding.review_block_user: What the persona knows about you
onboarding.review_block_relationship: People around you the persona knows
onboarding.review_block_mood_hint: The runtime refreshes this after the next conversation

errors.generic: Something went wrong · please try again later
errors.network: Network error · is the daemon still running?
